info.name: AI Render External API
info.description:
External integration endpoints for AI rendering (preset/cart) + job status polling.

All render endpoints are async: they return a job_id. Poll /jobs/{job_id} to get status + result payloads.

[안내] 프리셋용 ///// 해외 사이트, 카트용 ///// 국내 사이트, Job Status ///// 공통.

item.name: Render - Preset (External)
item.description:
### 프리셋용 ///// 해외 사이트
### Auth
- Header: x-api-key = EXTERNAL key

### Request
POST {{BASE_URL}}/api/external/render/preset

**Required**
- image_url (string): public URL to the room photo

**One of**
- preset_id (string): if provided, server resolves room/style/variant/dimensions/placement from preset map
- room + style (strings): required if preset_id is not provided

**Optional**
- variant (string/int): default "1"
- dimensions (string): free-form room dimensions (e.g. "W:4000 D:6000 H:2700")
- placement (string): extra instructions

### Response (Queued)
- job_id (string)
- status = "queued"
- resolved.room/style/variant

### Notes
- All rendering is async. Poll /jobs/{job_id} to get results.


### Field Rules
- image_url: public URL to the room photo (jpg/png/webp).
- preset_id: if provided, server resolves room/style/variant/dimensions/placement from preset map.
- If preset_id is NOT provided, room + style are required.
- variant: string/int, default "1".
- dimensions: free-form string (e.g. "W:4000 D:6000 H:2700").
- placement: free-form instruction text.

### Error Codes
- 400: Missing required fields (image_url) or invalid preset_id.
- 401/403: Invalid or missing x-api-key.
- 500: Server error (render/queue/redis).

item.name: Render - Cart (External)
item.description:
### 카트용 ///// 국내 사이트
### Auth
- Header: x-api-key = EXTERNAL key

### Request
POST {{BASE_URL}}/api/external/render/cart

**Required**
- image_url (string): public URL to the room photo
- items (array)

**Item fields**
- id (string)
- category (string)
- image_url (string): public URL to item image
- qty (int, default 1)
- dims_mm (object, optional): accepts width_mm/depth_mm/height_mm or w/d/h or width/depth/height
- name (string, optional)
- options (string|object|array, optional)

**Optional**
- room (string) default "livingroom"
- style (string) optional (used in placement text)
- variant (string/int) default "1"
- dimensions (string)
- placement (string)

### Response (Queued)
- job_id (string)
- status = "queued"
- cart_kept (array) / cart_dropped (array)

### Notes
- Server may drop items based on internal limits; dropped items are returned in cart_dropped.
- All rendering is async. Poll /jobs/{job_id} to get results.


### Field Rules
- image_url: public URL to the room photo (jpg/png/webp).
- items: array of item objects.
- item.id: string (required).
- item.category: string (required).
- item.image_url: public URL to item image (required).
- item.qty: int, default 1.
- item.dims_mm: object (optional). Accepted keys:
  - width_mm / depth_mm / height_mm
  - OR w / d / h
  - OR width / depth / height
- item.options: string | object | array (optional).
- item.name: string (optional).
- room: default "livingroom" if omitted.
- style: optional (used for placement text).
- variant: string/int, default "1".

### Error Codes
- 400: Missing image_url or items, or all items dropped by limits.
- 401/403: Invalid or missing x-api-key.
- 500: Server error (render/queue/redis).

item.name: Render - Video (External)
item.description:
### Video ///// 외부 사이트
### Auth
- Header: x-api-key = EXTERNAL key

### Request
POST {{BASE_URL}}/api/external/render/video

**Required**
- render_job_id (string): job_id returned by /api/external/render/preset or /api/external/render/cart after the image render has finished

**Optional**
- clip_count (int): 4 to 7, default 7. Valid legacy lower values are accepted, but generation uses up to 7 source clips when available: main + detail 1-6.
- cfg_scale (number): Kling cfg scale, default 0.5

### Response (Queued)
- job_id (string)
- status = "queued"
- render_job_id (string)
- clip_count (int)

### Notes
- This endpoint must be called after the source image render job has finished.
- All video generation is async. Poll /jobs/{job_id} to get the final video payload.
- The finished result returns source_images, clip_urls, clip_count, and video_url.

### Error Codes
- 400: Missing render_job_id or invalid clip_count/cfg_scale.
- 404: render_job_id was not found.
- 409: render_job_id is not finished yet.
- 401/403: Invalid or missing x-api-key.
- 500: Server error (queue/redis/video generation).

item.name: Job Status (Polling)
item.description:
### 공통 ///// 결과 조회
### Auth
- Header: x-api-key = EXTERNAL key

### Request
GET {{BASE_URL}}/jobs/{{JOB_ID}}

### Response
- status: queued | started | finished | failed
- result: present only when finished
- error: present only when failed

### Result payloads (finished)
- result.render + result.details
- render.result_url / render.result_urls
- details.details[] (list of detail view URLs)


### Field Rules
- job_id: UUID returned by render endpoint.
- status: queued | started | finished | failed.
- result: included only when finished.
- error: included only when failed.

### Error Codes
- 404: Job not found.
- 401/403: Invalid or missing x-api-key.
- 500: REDIS_URL not configured or server error.
